title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at McDonald's India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at McDonald's India
jsonLd.description:
McDonald's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About McDonald's India:
McDonald's India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India!
